description_long: This is a long, double-sided urban bench with a slatted wooden seat and a central black metal divider running the length of the bench. The seat is composed of evenly spaced wooden slats, providing both ventilation and a modern aesthetic. The bench is supported by a sturdy black metal frame with four angular legs, two on each side, and two vertical posts rising from the central divider, likely for structural support or to delineate seating areas. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for high-traffic public spaces such as parks, plazas, or transit stations. The absence of backrests and armrests allows for seating from either side, maximizing capacity. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to outdoor elements.
description: A long, double-sided slatted wooden bench with a central black metal divider and sturdy metal legs, designed for public urban spaces.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow profile, central divider, and slatted seat surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, double-sided seating, central divider, and four supporting legs.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0 with the same features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the full length and structure.
